plugins.name: commit-craft
plugins.one_liner: Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time.

installs.codex: Install commit-craft from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy commit-craft/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/commit-craft/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: dep-bump-brief
plugins.one_liner: Turns a dependency-bump diff into a plain-language brief — what changed, what might break, what to check.

installs.codex: Install dep-bump-brief from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy dep-bump-brief/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/dep-bump-brief/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: env-doctor
plugins.one_liner: Checks the toolchain against the project's declared versions at session start and warns early.

installs.codex: Install env-doctor from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy env-doctor/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/env-doctor/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: fork-a-foundry
plugins.one_liner: One skill that bootstraps your own self-running plugin workshop — the factory, shipping itself.

installs.codex: Install fork-a-foundry from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy fork-a-foundry/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/fork-a-foundry/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: night-clerk
plugins.one_liner: Ask your coding agent what plugin helps with X - the clerk searches the foundry catalog and hands you the host-native install path.

installs.codex: Install night-clerk from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy night-clerk/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/night-clerk/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: plugin-smith
plugins.one_liner: Scaffolds portable coding-agent plugins and audits their host-native packages.

installs.codex: Install plugin-smith from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy plugin-smith/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/plugin-smith/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: pr-narrator
plugins.one_liner: A skill that turns a branch's commits and diff into a reviewer-ready PR description.

installs.codex: Install pr-narrator from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy pr-narrator/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/pr-narrator/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: session-recap
plugins.one_liner: Writes a structured recap when a session ends and recalls it when the next one starts.

installs.codex: Install session-recap from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy session-recap/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/session-recap/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: test-gap-nudge
plugins.one_liner: A polite Stop-hook that notices source changes with no matching test changes and says so once.

installs.codex: Install test-gap-nudge from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy test-gap-nudge/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/test-gap-nudge/ and reload Cursor

plugins.name: todo-ledger
plugins.one_liner: Inventories TODO/FIXME/HACK comments with git-blame age and owners — tech debt as a dated, ranked ledger.

installs.codex: Install todo-ledger from Nightshift Foundry in the Plugins Directory
installs.cursor: Copy todo-ledger/ to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/todo-ledger/ and reload Cursor
